title: rubus hirtus var. rubristylus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. rubristylus, a lesser-known variety of the raspberry plant, is a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. rubristylus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
